steps.title: Locate Ramos's focus
steps.content: The first sentence says Ramos and colleagues explored how convergent evolution can result from a genetic mechanism shared by both lineages. That statement defines the focus of their study.

steps.title: Separate nearby studies
steps.content: Choice A describes Adler's focus on different mechanisms. Choice C contradicts the definition of convergent evolution in reproductively separate lineages. Choice D describes the later prevalence question studied by Brooks and Nair.

steps.title: Choose shared mechanisms
steps.content: The focus attributed to Ramos and colleagues is convergent traits arising through a shared genetic mechanism. The answer is B.
